goal: Enable story-driven, audio-first distribution of educational and creative content through podcasts and video podcasts
vision: Every story and concept can be heard and understood through immersive audio experiences
problemSolved: Limited reach for written content; audience prefers consuming content through audio/video
usp: Audio-first distribution that transforms stories and concepts into engaging podcast episodes and video podcasts
mvp: Basic podcast episode creation from story content
Distribution to Spotify and Apple Podcasts

validation.methodology: listener engagement metrics, subscription growth, completion rates
validation.successCriteria: 20% episode completion rate, 500+ subscribers in first quarter
